props.name: itemsPerPageOptions
props.defaultValue:
() => ([
      { value: 10, title: '10' },
      { value: 25, title: '25' },
      { value: 50, title: '50' },
      { value: 100, title: '100' },
      { value: -1, title: '$vuetify.dataFooter.itemsPerPageAll' },
    ])

expectedNotes.propNotes: VBtn has a broad inherited prop surface on top of button-specific props such as appendIcon, prependIcon, active state, icon mode, ripple, and visual variants.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Public slots include at least default, prepend, append, and loader.

expectedNotes.propNotes: Public props include the local picker controls plus inherited picker and preview props.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: The component forwards and augments incoming slots through v-slots, so slot support is part of the API.

expectedNotes.propNotes: VCombobox inherits a large text-field and select-style prop surface in addition to its own combobox controls.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Public slots include chip, item, selection, divider, and subheader among others.

expectedNotes.propNotes: VDataTable exposes a very broad prop surface assembled from pagination, filtering, sorting, grouping, selection, table, and footer factories.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: The public slot surface is large and includes default, top, bottom, body, colgroup, header/body/footer variants, and dotted slot names.

expectedNotes.propNotes: VDatePicker exposes many picker, navigation, and selection props with several typed defaults.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Public slots include title, header, append, prepend, controls, month, year, day, and actions.

expectedNotes.propNotes: Public API is small: defaults, disabled, reset, root, and scoped.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: The component primarily wraps a default child slot.

expectedNotes.propNotes: VDialog inherits a large overlay and activator prop surface in addition to dialog-specific props like fullscreen and scrollable.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Activator and default slots are both public.

expectedNotes.propNotes: VList has a sizable prop surface for activation, navigation, visual treatment, and event/update hooks.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: The root is still fundamentally child-driven even though many interactions happen through list item subcomponents.

expectedNotes.propNotes: VMenu inherits a broad overlay/menu prop surface beyond id and submenu.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Activator and default slots are both public.

expectedNotes.propNotes: VNumberInput exposes number-entry controls plus inherited field and input props.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Public slots include increment and decrement, with the rest inherited from the field stack.

expectedNotes.propNotes: VTextField has a large public surface spanning text input, field, validation, and visual props.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default, details, counter, and other field-adjacent slots are part of the API.

expectedNotes.propNotes: VTooltip inherits a broad overlay/activator surface beyond id, interactive, and text.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Activator and default slots are both public.
